# Paths that MUST NOT be flagged by DefaultSensitivePatterns.
# Each line is an anti-target — a near-miss designed to catch overly-greedy globs.

# Lookalikes for .env
envoy.yaml
envs.go
env-handler.ts
dotenv-loader.js
environment.md
env_vars.txt
README-env.md

# Lookalikes for *.pem / *.key extensions
public.pem.sig
notes-on-pem.md
keyboard.go
keyholder.ts
monkey.go
key-mapping.yaml
turnkey-solution.md
privatekey.md
donkey.go
keychain.md
keywords.ts

# Lookalikes for .ssh/ (no .ssh directory segment)
sshconfig
ssh-tunnel.md
ssh.md
sshd-notes.txt

# Lookalikes for .aws/ (no .aws directory segment)
aws-docs/overview.md
.aws-guide.md
awscli-notes.md

# Lookalikes for .git/config (no .git dir segment)
gitignore-rules.md
gitconfig.md
mygitconfig.md

# Plain source that shouldn't match
main.go
README.md
package.json
Dockerfile
Makefile
src/utils/helpers.ts
cmd/cli.go

# Empty-like paths stay empty; the test runner skips them.

# Non-credential dotfiles
.gitignore
.editorconfig
.prettierrc
.eslintrc
.dockerignore

# Benign files that happen to live near sensitive-looking contexts
my-kube-deploy.yaml
kube-docs.md
netrc-migration.md
